why_relevant: Domestic one-person-company methodology with practical notes on payment, notification, niche markets, productized assets, and low-overhead execution.
Curated user acquisition channels for independent developers and startup products, useful for first 1000 users and channel selection.
Independent developer guide covering product, launch, overseas setup, monetization, and common solo-founder workflows.
Independent developer money-making experience collection, useful for concrete revenue paths and common misconception checks.
Book-style exploration of AI-enabled one-person companies and how agents may change leverage, roles, and company form.
Infrastructure-oriented project for data collection, intelligence systems, analysis, and decision support for super individuals and one-person companies.
One-person-company tutorial repository that can provide terminology, learning path, and domestic learner expectations.
Solo-builder notes from a domestic independent developer perspective, useful for low-overhead building and operational heuristics.
Global indie product and maker resource directory, useful only as commercial mechanism reference before adapting to China.
Micro-SaaS idea directory useful for studying narrow workflow patterns and alternative business mechanisms, not for direct China copy-paste.
